title: JWaypoints
description: JWayPoints is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that spawns a guiding arrow to lead players to set waypoints
body:
# 📍 JWayPoints – Simple & Effective Waypoint Navigation!
JWayPoints is a lightweight and easy-to-use Minecraft plugin that helps players navigate to specific coordinates with ease! No more getting lost or constantly checking F3 – just set your waypoint and follow the guiding arrow!

Also, check out my other plugin(s):

[![GoToJMNS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ddcfa4488dad414879a005410442fd1feca7877_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/jmenus)

## 🌟 Features:
### Core Features
✅ **Simple Commands** - Use ***/waypoint set \<x> \<y> \<z>*** or the shorter alias ***/wp set \<x> \<y> \<z>*** to set your target destination.

🧭 **Visual Navigation** - A floating arrow will appear above your head, pointing you toward your waypoint.

🏞️ **No More Guesswork** - Perfect for exploring, locating builds, or meeting up with friends.

⚡ **Lightweight & Efficient** - Designed to have minimal impact on server performance.


## 📋 Commands:
### Basic Commands
- `/waypoint set <name>` - Save a waypoint at your current location
- `/waypoint set <name> <x> <y> <z>` - Save a waypoint at specific coordinates
- `/waypoint list` - View all your saved waypoints
- `/waypoint activate <name>` - Follow a saved waypoint
- `/waypoint deactivate` - Stop following your current waypoint
- `/waypoint remove <name>` - Delete a saved waypoint
- `/waypoint gui` - Open the waypoint management GUI

### Customization Commands
- `/waypoint design <name>` - Change your arrow design
- `/waypoint designs` - List all available arrow designs
- `/waypoint sound <name>` - Change your arrival sound
- `/waypoint sounds` - List all available arrival sounds

## 🎮 GUI System:
- **Waypoint Manager** - Easily view and manage all your waypoints
- **Settings Menu** - Customize your arrow and sound preferences
- **Design Gallery** - Preview and select from different arrow designs
- **Sound Library** - Test and choose your preferred arrival sound

## 🌍 Why JWayPoints?
Whether you're a survival adventurer or a server admin looking to enhance player navigation, JWayPoints is the perfect addition to your Minecraft world! Set your path, customize your experience, follow the arrow, and never get lost again!
